testcase.name: test_byte_order_mark

failure.message: Failed: bom_in_file error code should be given

testcase.failure:
self = <test.test_sectxt.SecTxtTestCase testMethod=test_byte_order_mark>
def test_byte_order_mark(self): url = "https://example.com/.well-known/security.txt" expires = f"Expires: {(date.today() + timedelta(days=10)).isoformat()}T18:37:07z\n" byte_content_with_bom = b'\xef\xbb\xbf\xef\xbb\xbfContact: mailto:me@example.com\n' \ + expires.encode()
buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, url) c.setopt(c.HTTPHEADER, ["Content-Type: text/plain"]) c.setopt(c.WRITEDATA, buffer) c.perform() c.close()
s = SecurityTXT("example.com") assert (not s.is_valid()) if not any(d["code"] == "bom_in_file" for d in s.errors): > pytest.fail("bom_in_file error code should be given") E Failed: bom_in_file error code should be given
test/test_sectxt.py:372: Failed

testcase.name: test_invalid_uri_scheme

failure.message: Failed: invalid_uri_scheme error code should be given

testcase.failure:
self = <test.test_sectxt.SecTxtTestCase testMethod=test_invalid_uri_scheme>
def test_invalid_uri_scheme(self): url = "https://example.com/.well-known/security.txt" buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, url) c.setopt(c.NOBODY, True) try: c.perform() except pycurl.error: pass c.close()
s = SecurityTXT("example.com") if not any(d["code"] == "invalid_uri_scheme" for d in s.errors): > pytest.fail("invalid_uri_scheme error code should be given") E Failed: invalid_uri_scheme error code should be given
test/test_sectxt.py:344: Failed

testcase.name: test_multiple_signed_messages
testcase.failure:
self = <test.test_sectxt.SecTxtTestCase testMethod=test_multiple_signed_messages>
def test_multiple_signed_messages(self): content = _signed_example.replace( "-----BEGIN PGP SIGNATURE-----", "-----BEGIN PGP SIGNATURE-----\n-----BEGIN PGP SIGNATURE-----", ) p = Parser(content.encode()) > self.assertFalse(p.is_valid()) E AssertionError: True is not false
test/test_sectxt.py:272: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_not_correct_path

failure.message: Failed: location error code should be given

testcase.failure:
self = <test.test_sectxt.SecTxtTestCase testMethod=test_not_correct_path>
def test_not_correct_path(self): url = "https://example.com/.well-known/security.txt" buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, url) c.setopt(c.NOBODY, True) try: c.perform() except pycurl.error: pass c.close()
s = SecurityTXT("example.com") if not any(d["code"] == "location" for d in s.errors): > pytest.fail("location error code should be given") E Failed: location error code should be given
test/test_sectxt.py:327: Failed

testcase.name: test_valid_security_txt

failure.message: assert False + where False = is_valid() + where is_valid = <sectxt.SecurityTXT object at 0x1066277d0>.is_valid

testcase.failure:
self = <test.test_sectxt.SecTxtTestCase testMethod=test_valid_security_txt>
def test_valid_security_txt(self): url = "https://example.com/.well-known/security.txt" byte_content = b'Contact: mailto:me@example.com\n' + bytes(f"Expires: {(date.today() + timedelta(days=10)).isoformat()}T18:37:07z\n", "utf-8")
buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, url) c.setopt(c.HTTPHEADER, ["Content-Type: text/plain"]) c.setopt(c.WRITEDATA, buffer) c.perform() c.close()
m = buffer.getvalue().decode('utf-8') s = SecurityTXT("example.com") > assert (s.is_valid()) E assert False E + where False = is_valid() E + where is_valid = <sectxt.SecurityTXT object at 0x1066277d0>.is_valid
test/test_sectxt.py:310: AssertionError
